# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

const ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS = ["users", "products", "orders", "posts"];
const MAX_RESULTS = 100;
const RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW = 60000;
const RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS = 100;

const rateLimitMap = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();

function sanitizeKey(key: string): string {
  return key.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, "");
}

function validateCollection(collection: string): boolean {
  return ALLOWED_COLLECTIONS.includes(collection);
}

function getClientIdentifier(req: Request): string {
  const forwarded = req.headers.get("x-forwarded-for");
  const realIp = req.headers.get("x-real-ip");
  return forwarded?.split(",")[0].trim() || realIp || "unknown";
}

function checkRateLimit(clientId: string): boolean {
  const now = Date.now();
  const limit = rateLimitMap.get(clientId);

  if (!limit || now > limit.resetTime) {
    rateLimitMap.set(clientId, {
      count: 1,
      resetTime: now + RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW,
    });
    return true;
  }

  if (limit.count >= RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS) {
    return false;
  }

  limit.count++;
  return true;
}

function buildKvKey(parts: string[]): Deno.KvKey {
  return parts.map((part) => sanitizeKey(part));
}

async function searchKv(
  collection: string,
  filters: Record<string, string>,
  limit: number = 50
): Promise<any[]> {
  const results: any[] = [];
  const prefix = [collection];

  if (Object.keys(filters).length === 0) {
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      results.push({ key: entry.key, value: entry.value });
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
    return results;
  }

  const filterKeys = Object.keys(filters);
  const firstFilter = filterKeys[0];
  const firstValue = filters[firstFilter];

  const searchPrefix = [...prefix, sanitizeKey(firstValue)];
  const iter = kv.list({ prefix: searchPrefix });

  for await (const entry of iter) {
    const value = entry.value as Record<string, any>;

    const matches = filterKeys.every((filterKey) => {
      const filterValue = filters[filterKey];
      if (value && typeof value === "object" && filterKey in value) {
        return String(value[filterKey])
          .toLowerCase()
          .includes(filterValue.toLowerCase());
      }
      return false;
    });

    if (matches) {
      results.push({ key: entry.key, value: entry.value });
      if (results.length >= limit) break;
    }
  }

  return results;
}

async function createRecord(
  collection: string,
  id: string,
  data: Record<string, any>
): Promise<void> {
  const key = buildKvKey([collection, id]);
  const timestamp = Date.now();
  const record = { ...data, id, createdAt: timestamp, updatedAt: timestamp };
  await kv.set(key, record);

  if (data.userId) {
    const userKey = buildKvKey([collection, "by_user", data.userId, id]);
    await kv.set(userKey, record);
  }

  if (data.category) {
    const categoryKey = buildKvKey([
      collection,
      "by_category",
      data.category,
      id,
    ]);
    await kv.set(categoryKey, record);
  }
}

async function getRecord(collection: string, id: string): Promise<any> {
  const key = buildKvKey([collection, id]);
  const result = await kv.get(key);
  return result.value;
}

async function updateRecord(
  collection: string,
  id: string,
  data: Record<string, any>
): Promise<void> {
  const existing = await getRecord(collection, id);
  if (!existing) {
    throw new Error("Record not found");
  }

  const key = buildKvKey([collection, id]);
  const updated = { ...existing, ...data, updatedAt: Date.now() };
  await kv.set(key, updated);

  if (data.userId || existing.userId) {
    const userId = data.userId || existing.userId;
    const userKey = buildKvKey([collection, "by_user", userId, id]);
    await kv.set(userKey, updated);
  }

  if (data.category || existing.category) {
    const category = data.category || existing.category;
    const categoryKey = buildKvKey([collection, "by_category", category, id]);
    await kv.set(categoryKey, updated);
  }
}

async function deleteRecord(collection: string, id: string): Promise<void> {
  const existing = await getRecord(collection, id);
  if (!existing) {
    throw new Error("Record not found");
  }

  const key = buildKvKey([collection, id]);
  await kv.delete(key);

  if (existing.userId) {
    const userKey = buildKvKey([collection, "by_user", existing.userId, id]);
    await kv.delete(userKey);
  }

  if (existing.category) {
    const categoryKey = buildKvKey([
      collection,
      "by_category",
      existing.category,
      id,
    ]);
    await kv.delete(categoryKey);
  }
}

async function handleRequest(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const clientId = getClientIdentifier(req);

  if (!checkRateLimit(clientId)) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Rate limit exceeded" }), {
      status: 429,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  const corsHeaders = {
    "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type, Authorization",
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
  };

  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: corsHeaders });
  }

  try {
    const pathParts = path.split("/").filter((p) => p);

    if (pathParts.length === 0) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          message: "Deno KV API",
          endpoints: [
            "GET /{collection}/search - Search with query params",
            "GET /{collection}/{id} - Get by ID",
            "POST /{collection} - Create record",
            "PUT /{collection}/{id} - Update record",
            "DELETE /{collection}/{id} - Delete record",
          ],
        }),
        { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    const collection = pathParts[0];

    if (!validateCollection(collection)) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid collection" }),
        { status: 400, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    if (pathParts[1] === "search" && method === "GET") {
      const filters: Record<string, string> = {};
      url.searchParams.forEach((value, key) => {
        if (key !== "limit") {
          filters[sanitizeKey(key)] = sanitizeKey(value);
        }
      });

      const limit = Math.min(
        parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "50"),
        MAX_RESULTS
      );

      const results = await searchKv(collection, filters, limit);

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ results, count: results.length }),
        { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    if (method === "GET" && pathParts.length === 2) {
      const id = pathParts[1];
      const record = await getRecord(collection, id);

      if (!record) {
        return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
          status: 404,
          headers: corsHeaders,
        });
      }

      return new Response(JSON.stringify(record), {
        status: 200,
        headers: corsHeaders,
      });
    }

    if (method === "POST" && pathParts.length === 1) {
      const body = await req.json();
      const id = body.id || crypto.randomUUID();

      await createRecord(collection, id, body);

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ success: true, id }),
        { status: 201, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    if (method === "PUT" && pathParts.length === 2) {
      const id = pathParts[1];
      const body = await req.json();

      await updateRecord(collection, id, body);

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ success: true, id }),
        { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    if (method === "DELETE" && pathParts.length === 2) {
      const id = pathParts[1];

      await deleteRecord(collection, id);

      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ success: true }),
        { status: 200, headers: corsHeaders }
      );
    }

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: corsHeaders,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Error:", error);
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: error.message || "Internal server error" }),
      { status: 500, headers: corsHeaders }
    );
  }
}

serve(handleRequest);
